# ParagonNodeComponent.Tint property

The layer's authored `rgbaTint` (multiply colour), or `null` for no tint. E.g. the glyph-socket base disc is drawn through a grey `0xFF8A8A8A` tint.

```csharp
public RgbaTint? Tint { get; set; }
```
